get.description:
Public endpoint to check if a pincode is serviceable.
Useful for frontend to show availability before registration.
Check if an email is already registered.
Check if a phone number is already registered.
Check if a referral code is valid.

patch.description:
Update current user's profile fields. Only allowed fields are updated.
Intended usage: save missing phone/address during checkout.
If pincode is updated, logs serviceability info (non-blocking).

get.description: Return full current user details useful for prefilling forms (phone, address, etc).

Return profile details for the currently authenticated user without exposing internal identifiers.
Use this endpoint for frontend profile display where `id` must not be returned.

post.description:
Exchange a Google auth code for an id_token, then create or retrieve the user and
return an access token for the app.

Expected body: { "auth_code": "...", "pincode": "...", "signup": true/false, "referral_code": "..." }

For signup flow, pincode is optional. If not provided, we'll allow signup anyway.
Pincode validation will be enforced at checkout time when creating orders.

schema.title: Response List Users Auth Users Get

parameters.name: search

schema.description: Search query for Brand or Model
schema.title: Search

parameters.description: Search query for Brand or Model

post.description:
Create an order linked to current authenticated user.
Uses the provided quoted price as the AI estimated price.
Automatically distributes as lead to partners if pincode is serviceable.

PINCODE VALIDATION:
- Pincode must be serviceable by at least one partner
- Non-serviceable pincodes will be rejected with appropriate error message

get.description: Get orders for the current user.

schema.title: Response Get My Orders Sell Phone My Orders Get

post.description:
Cancel an order if it hasn't been purchased by a partner.
Only the order owner can cancel their order.

get.description:
Get available leads in partner's serviceable pincodes.
Shows leads that are not locked or purchased by others.

schema.title: Response Get Available Leads Sell Phone Partner Leads Available Get

get.description:
Get full lead details. Only available if:
1. Lead is in partner's serviceable pincode
2. Lead is not locked by another partner
3. Partner has locked this lead OR lead is available

post.description:
Lock a lead for exclusive viewing. Race-condition safe.
Lock expires after configured duration (default 15 minutes).

delete.description:
Release a locked lead back to the marketplace.
Can only unlock leads locked by the current partner.

post.description:
Purchase a locked lead by deducting credits from partner account.
Race-condition safe with SELECT FOR UPDATE on partner credits.

Admin login endpoint.
Returns JWT token with admin_id and user_type='admin'.

get.description: Get current admin profile

post.description: Create new admin (super_admin only).

get.description: Get partners pending verification or in clarification.

get.description: Get complete partner details including verification history, pincodes, and agents.

post.description: Request additional information from partner.

schema.title: Response Request Partner Clarification Admin Partners  Partner Id  Request Clarification Post

post.description:
Approve partner verification.
Can be used to approve pending partners or re-approve rejected partners.
When re-approving a rejected partner, clears the rejection reason and activates the account.

schema.title: Response Approve Partner Admin Partners  Partner Id  Approve Post

post.description:
Reject partner verification.
Sets verification_status to 'rejected' and deactivates the partner account.
Partner can still login but cannot access partner features until reapproved.

schema.title: Response Reject Partner Admin Partners  Partner Id  Reject Post

post.description:
Place a partner on hold for rule violations.
Partner cannot access leads or agents cannot perform actions while on hold.

Partner self-assigns themselves as an agent.
Creates a new agent record for the partner so they can login to the agent portal.
Uses partner's existing password if not provided (same credentials for both portals).

post.description:
Complete the pickup process with detailed phone inspection.
Records actual condition, final price, customer acceptance, and photos.
Stores all photos as binary BLOB data in the database.

Process payment for a completed pickup.
Only available if customer accepted the offer.
Reschedule a pickup that was previously scheduled.

Cancel a pickup when customer is not willing to sell.
Marks the order as cancelled (terminal state).

Generate a new referral code for the logged-in user.
One code per user (previous code becomes inactive if exists).

Get referral information for the logged-in user.

Validate a referral code without redeeming it.

Should be called after signup to award points.

get.description: Get current referral system settings (admin only).
